scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.generate:vapid: node -e "const webpush = require('backend/node_modules/web-push'); const keys = webpush.generateVAPIDKeys(); console.log('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=' + keys.publicKey); console.log('VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=' + keys.privateKey);"
scripts.setup: cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && echo 'Created backend/.env — please fill in your credentials!'
